name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skyline plugins for Claude Code, including MCP daemon wiring and agent-side enforcement hooks.

plugins.name: core-claude-grok
plugins.description: Unified baseline for Claude Code + Grok. /core-claude-grok:setup installs the judge-hook, writing-guard, core-hud, and guidelines (CLAUDE.md on Claude), with bypass posture gated by the judge. Skyline-aware, transcript escalations, dual-compat for Grok. /core-claude-grok:doctor audits.

plugins.name: soloterm-agent-org-claude-grok
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org v2 (unified for Claude Code + Grok). Bundles Solo MCP + the five roles (orchestrator, planner, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit) + capacity-check, build-slot, ghost-probe. Dual-compatible session discipline hooks (lane-mark, conduct-refresh, stop-gate). Includes Codex conduct pack.
